title: CookbookForge
concept: An open book (two pages meeting at a central 0.5-unit spine gap) with a four-pointed forge spark rising from the spine — 'forging' source material into multi-format cookbooks. Page details (code block, text lines, figure frame, list bullets) appear at larger sizes (64+px) and vanish at small sizes (≤32px), keeping the silhouette clean.
metaphor: page content: code lines, figure frame, list items
notes: Enhanced v2: book pages now contain negative-space details (text lines, code block, figure frame, list bullets) visible at 64+px. Brand-color is #D97706 amber. PNGs rendered via per-pixel nonzero winding rasterizer.
